# Wide Angle Surveying Website

This is a modern React TypeScript web application for Wide Angle Surveying, a professional surveying company based in the UAE.

## Project Setup Completed ✅

- [x] **Project Structure**: Vite + React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS
- [x] **Pages Created**: Home, Services, About, Contact with modern UI components
- [x] **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach with Tailwind CSS
- [x] **GitHub Pages Ready**: Configured for deployment with GitHub Actions
- [x] **SEO Optimized**: Meta tags, semantic HTML, and performance optimizations
- [x] **UAE Business Focus**: Content tailored for surveying services in the UAE

## Key Features

- Modern UI with Framer Motion animations
- Lucide React icons throughout
- Professional surveying services showcase
- Contact form with service selection
- Responsive design for all devices
- TypeScript for better development experience
- GitHub Actions for automated deployment

## Development Commands

- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint

## Deployment

The project is configured for GitHub Pages deployment via GitHub Actions. Push to main branch to deploy automatically.
